# Milestone 2 — Workflow Simplification & UX

> Tracking issue for milestone execution
> Priority: P0
> Source docs: `ROADMAP.md`, `BACKLOG.md`

## Goal

Define one canonical user journey and reduce unnecessary complexity.

## Outcomes to deliver

- Clear split between **Quick Sizing** and **Planning** workflows
- A curated preset library for common scenarios
- Results pages/reports summarize bottlenecks and next actions
- The official docs and UI follow the same step-by-step flow

## Child issues to open and track

- [ ] Define canonical user workflow  
  Template: `Docs / Workflow Alignment`  
  Labels: `priority:P0`, `type:docs`, `type:ui`  
  Issue: #____

- [ ] Split product modes: Quick Sizing vs Planning  
  Template: `Docs / Workflow Alignment`  
  Labels: `priority:P0`, `type:ui`, `type:docs`  
  Issue: #____

- [ ] Build curated preset library  
  Template: `Feature / Implementation`  
  Labels: `priority:P1`, `type:ui`, `type:docs`  
  Issue: #____

- [ ] Improve results summary for decision-making  
  Template: `Feature / Implementation`  
  Labels: `priority:P1`, `type:ui`, `type:reporting`  
  Issue: #____

## Exit criteria

- [ ] A new user can go from preset to usable result without reading code
- [ ] The guided UI no longer mixes simple sizing and advanced planning prematurely
- [ ] Docs and UI present the same canonical workflow

## Notes

- This milestone should follow Milestone 1 because it depends on coherent terminology and trusted outputs.
- Prefer simple workflow improvements over adding new advanced inputs.
